title: In-house micro-electroporation system and protocol
author: PEKKAN, KEREM
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A detailed and step-by-step protocol of the in-house micro-electroporation system designed for early chick embryonic hearts and vessels. The required software file (.vi) to run a fine-tuned and optimized electroporation is also provided as supporting material. This will accompany our current manuscript titled "Modulation of mechanosensitive genes during embryonic aortic arch development."
steps_raw: A detailed and step-by-step protocol of the in-house micro-electroporation system designed for early chick embryonic hearts and vessels.
